content:
[{'text': "I'm at (11.65, 7.87). The robot is near the right edge of the map. The green destination is directly above. Looking at the map, the right side of the map seems to have a wall. I need to find a vertical passage. 

Let me think about this differently. The map shows three horizontal corridors. The destination is at Y=13.67 which is in the upper corridor. The middle corridor is at Y≈7.87. There must be a vertical passage somewhere. Looking at the map image, the black walls between corridors appear to have a gap somewhere. 

Let me try rotating to face up and try to move forward to see if there's a passage at this X position (11.65).", 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_01JJqSGHhQSXEHu7ugBBCQN1', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'angle_degrees': 90}, 'name': 'rotate', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
